name: palo_alto_panorama
explanation: Palo Alto Panorama is a vendor security tile for centralized Palo Alto firewall management. The spec contains only a `logs` template (UDP/TCP listener at a user-supplied `<PORT>`) and there is no Agent metric check beyond `__init__.py`. Setup requires the operator to configure Panorama to forward syslog to the Agent and to choose the listener port; there is no upstream service running alongside the Agent to fingerprint, and no host/endpoint auto-config could resolve.
notes: Logs-only vendor tile (pattern N analogue). No metric check, no auto_conf.yaml.
